solutionA:
apiVersion: scafctl.io/v1beta1
kind: Solution
metadata:
  name: my-solution
spec:
  resolvers:
    greeting:
      provider: static
      with:
        value: Hello
solutionB:
apiVersion: scafctl.io/v1beta1
kind: Solution
metadata:
  name: my-solution
  description: Updated solution
spec:
  resolvers:
    greeting:
      provider: static
      with:
        value: Hello, World!
